title: Change webhooks name
excerpt:
Hi, 
There is a way to change the webhooks name?

posts.author: shay.butran (shay butran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
There is a way to change the webhooks name?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @shay.butran,

If you are referring to the regular webhooks (as seen here), it is not possible to change their names.

Let me know if you have any other questions!

Cheers,
Matias
